hero.headline: Ukuhlonipha
hero.subheadline: Ukweseka Nokufeza Imfundo Yawo Wonke Umuntu e-Afrika
hero.description: I-New Education Standard Award Africa ({{editionName}}) ibungaza abaholi abanombono, izikhungo nabanobuhlakani abakha ikusasa lemfundo kulo lonke i-Afrika.

mission.title: Inhloso Yethu
mission.description: Ukuqaphela, ukuqinisekisa nokubungaza abantu, izinhlangano nezikhungo eziqhuba Imfundo Yawo Wonke Umuntu kulo lonke i-Afrika.

hero.title: Izigaba Zemiklomelo Esemthethweni Eziyi-17
hero.description: Ukubungaza ubuhle kwezemfundo, umthwalo womphakathi wenkampani, ubuchwepheshe nomthelela womphakathi kulo lonke izwekazi lase-Afrika.

footer.tagline: Ukubungaza Amaqhawe Emfundo e-Afrika kusukela ngo-2010
